## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration opportunities between Jon Bishop and Marcel Santilli's rapidly growing AI-powered marketing company, GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has experienced explosive growth, reaching $7M ARR, raising $12M Series A, and growing to 40+ full-time employees in \~6-8 months](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [The company is innovating in AI-powered marketing workflows, attracting top talent, and disrupting traditional agency models](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [GrowthX is actively hiring for managing director roles, seeking committed individuals with deep expertise in various marketing disciplines](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Jon is open to new opportunities but not actively job hunting; he's considering a shift back to marketing work after solo product building](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Rapid Growth and Fundraising

  - [Reached \~$7M ARR in 6-8 months from initial product discussions](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A in under 30 days (first fundraise)](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Grew from 4M to 6M+ ARR during fundraising process](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Now at 40+ full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Profitable, but planning controlled spending to satisfy VC expectations](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### GrowthX's Innovative Approach

  - [Built AI coding agent for creating AI workflows as code](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Processing millions of tokens per task, learning from human reviews/edits](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Attracting top talent (e.g., early Airbnb/Stripe engineer) with tech-focused approach](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Poaching best people from agencies, offering equity + cash compensation](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Focus on making tools 10-100x easier to use and more productive](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### GrowthX's Service Offerings and Team Structure

  - [Content, distribution, and conversion focus](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Work streams: tutorial content, content refresh, programmatic SEO, link building](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Expanding into e-commerce, lifecycle marketing, visitor signal analysis](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Hiring managing directors (similar to law firm partners)](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [MDs responsible for sales, product development, team building, and client management](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Equity + cash compensation with potential for increased responsibility and earnings](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### Jon's Current Situation and Interests

  - [Still building products solo, but considering a shift back to marketing work](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Feeling isolated in solo product development](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Interested in services and team-based work](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Not actively job hunting, but open to interesting opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Has broad marketing experience, less focused on pure SEO](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jon to reflect on his career direction over the next couple of months](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [If interested, Jon to consider specific GrowthX roles and work streams aligned with his expertise](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1253.0)
  - [Jon to reach out to Marcel or Kyle (GrowthX team member) if he decides to pursue opportunities at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Marcel to potentially introduce Jon to Kyle for further discussions if Jon expresses strong interest](https://fathom.video/share/6AhM9c7nNswfkyFpQ_yFRzneX_1iBcQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
